tasks.name: scrape_bids
tasks.description: Scrape CC + BC for new bids

tasks.name: geocode_distances
tasks.description: Backfill distance_miles on active_bids.json for any new scrapes that have city/state but no computed distance. Runs ~5 min after scrape_bids.

tasks.name: check_email_bids
tasks.description: Scan Gmail for bid invitations (log only)

tasks.name: ingest_email_invites
tasks.description: Parse Gmail invitations -> add to active_bids.json

tasks.name: gmail_organize
tasks.description: Apply Gmail labels (Lost/Follow-ups/Bid Invites/etc.)

tasks.name: track_submissions
tasks.description: Detect submitted proposals from Sent folder, update bid status

tasks.name: crm_sync
tasks.description: Pull CRM statuses (Won/Lost/Submitted/Awaiting) into Carol

tasks.name: gmail_rules_from_crm
tasks.description: Regenerate Gmail labeling rules from CRM (runs before gmail_organize)

tasks.name: crm_writeback
tasks.description: Push Carol's pipeline updates back to CRM Sheet (status changes, new bids)

tasks.name: proposal_audit
tasks.description: Scan Sent folder, extract bid amounts, fill CRM Bid Amount columns

tasks.name: cost_watchdog
tasks.description: Monitor daily Gemini spend; alert at $0.50, kill-switch at $1.50

tasks.name: crm_full_sync
tasks.description: End-of-day full reconciliation: scrape + ingest + sync + writeback

tasks.name: daily_briefing
tasks.description: Morning briefing + email report

tasks.name: followup_intelligence_brief
tasks.description: Per-bid follow-up intelligence: who chased, who replied with what, next action plan
tasks._disabled_reason: Superseded by morning_chase_report.py (7AM) which has cleaner recap+propose+approve workflow. Two competing briefs at 5/7AM confused the user (5/26).

tasks.name: check_followups
tasks.description: Check and notify about due follow-ups
tasks._disabled_reason: Superseded by chase_silent_followups — conflicting cadence + stale Bid# mapping

tasks.name: pipeline_advance
tasks.description: Auto-advance projects with pending steps

tasks.name: bid_reminder_morning
tasks.description: Telegram morning brief (today + tomorrow bids)

tasks.name: bid_reminder_imminent
tasks.description: Telegram afternoon check for sweet-spot bids due today

tasks.name: bid_reminder_new
tasks.description: Telegram alert for new strong-match bids (runs hourly)

tasks.name: cowork_sync
tasks.description: Pull claude.ai conversations + index into MemPalace

tasks.name: import_cowork
tasks.description: Index manually-dropped exports in data/cowork_imports/

tasks.name: cowork_local
tasks.description: Index local Claude Cowork sessions (desktop app)

tasks.name: sync_openclaw
tasks.description: Sync Carol AGENTS.md/USER.md to OpenClaw workspace (Telegram agent)

tasks.name: loss_postmortem_watch
tasks.description: Auto-investigate newly Lost bids: postmortem + Notes + Telegram

tasks.name: process_followup_replies
tasks.description: Auto-classify Inbox replies to follow-ups, update CRM, Telegram ping

tasks.name: crm_daily_summary
tasks.description: CRM status breakdown — morning briefing

tasks.name: crm_daily_summary
tasks.description: CRM status breakdown — end-of-day recap

tasks.name: followup_scheduler
tasks.description: Cadence engine: auto-FU + auto-close + phone flag
tasks._disabled_reason: Superseded by chase_silent_followups — conflicting cadence + stale Bid# mapping

tasks.name: daemon_self_health
tasks.description: Refresh daemon heartbeat file for external watchdog

tasks.name: team_chat_audit
tasks.description: Snapshot team Telegram transcripts (owner audit)

tasks.name: scrape_parkway
tasks.description: Scrape Parkway Construction portal (top GC) for nearby projects

tasks.name: scrape_procore
tasks.description: Scrape Procore sub bid invitations

tasks.name: team_chat_watcher
tasks.description: Real-time Telegram alert when teammate messages Carol

tasks.name: chase_command_watcher
tasks.description: Act on owner's Telegram chase commands (approve/pause/resume) — clears the approval gate so chases send on the user's word

tasks.name: chase_silent_followups
tasks.description: Aggressive retry loop: keeps following up non-responders at days 3/7/14/21 until reply or 5 attempts
tasks._disabled_reason: Conflicting cadence with manual chase batches AND uses hard close-out language by attempt 11 (one GC contact got 'closing this out today' language on attempt 11 — user vetoed). Needs softer-tone templates + coordination with manual sends before re-enabling.

tasks.name: forward_div27
tasks.description: Auto-forward Division 27 (Communications/Low-Voltage/AV) bid invites to Hyperscale Wiring

tasks.name: apply_crm_formatting
tasks.description: Re-apply Sort Priority formula + sort sheet so newly added bids stay on top

tasks.name: lessons_audit
tasks.description: Verify Carol's code complies with AGENTS_LESSONS.md rules — catch regressions before user notices

tasks.name: hallucination_sentry
tasks.description: Ping Carol with truth-checkable questions and verify her answers vs ground truth files

tasks.name: backfill_chase_history
tasks.description: Sync Gmail Sent follow-ups -> bid_status.json so chase counts stay accurate (ground truth, not stale cache)

tasks.name: morning_chase_report
tasks.description: Daily 7AM: yesterday's chase recap + today's proposed plan -> Telegram. User must approve before any chases fire.

tasks.name: rebuild_known_recipient_domains
tasks.description: Daily 4:30 AM: refresh trusted recipient-domains cache from Gmail Inbox FROM so send_email.py can catch typo'd domains (e.g. newcoconstruction.co vs .com)

tasks.name: audit_chase_subject_ids
tasks.description: Detect MIS-TAGGED outbound subjects ([ID:] tag resolves to a project unrelated to the subject = would misroute a reply). Stale Bid# is logged but harmless (routing uses [ID:] tag + domain, not Bid#). Pings owner ONCE per NEW mis-tag only (deduped); never re-pings historical ones.

tasks.name: cleanup_project_docs
tasks.description: Sunday 03:00 — delete bid doc folders for closed projects (Lost/Won/Withdrawn) older than 14 days

tasks.name: self_audit
tasks.description: Nightly self-audit: CRM vs Sent Mail vs chase-state, Telegram digest of mismatches

tasks.name: dashboard_keepalive
tasks.description: Keep pipeline dashboard alive on 127.0.0.1:8765

tasks.name: cowork_agent_index
tasks.description: Index desktop Cowork-tab estimating sessions into MemPalace (incremental)

tasks.name: loss_learning_digest
tasks.description: Weekly loss-learning rebuild + Telegram digest (Mon 06:30)

tasks.name: direct_ask_watcher
tasks.description: Win-channel fast lane: GC direct pricing asks -> URGENT ping (30min cadence)

tasks.name: morning_bid_brief
tasks.description: 6AM opener: top-3 due TODAY + tomorrow preview -> Telegram (05:45)

tasks.name: weekly_bid_plan
tasks.description: Daily 05:35: Mon fresh week plan; Tue-Fri re-audit (lock past days, swap in better newcomers)

tasks.name: chase_executor
tasks.description: AUTOPILOT: execute morning chase plan w/ 10-layer guard stack (08:45, Mon-Fri gate internal)

tasks.name: pbi_refresh
tasks.description: PBI: ensure dossiers + enqueue Claude-read queue + revalue + index (no LLM/no downloads)

tasks.name: pbi_self_audit
tasks.description: PBI: provenance/freshness/blocked-surfaced fail-loud audit

tasks.name: fetch_worker
tasks.description: Run queued background doc-fetch jobs (enqueue_fetch) + push result to requester on completion

tasks.name: deadbid_guard
tasks.description: Daily: close dead bids (we-owe past GC deadline / >10d stale) so corpses never reach the chase/draft path

tasks.name: inbox_monitor
tasks.description: ALWAYS-ON: LLM thread-comprehension of new GC mail -> live per-bid state + owner alerts on WON/LOST/WE-OWE

tasks.name: pbi_sync
tasks.description: LIVE PBI: best real value per active bid -> data/memory/pbi_state.json + sync estimates into dossiers

tasks.name: stage2_pick
tasks.description: LIVE pick intelligence: scope-sniff open in-radius opportunities -> CCF-scope value + BID/MAYBE/PASS -> data/memory/pick_state.json

tasks.name: pbi_deepen
tasks.description: KNOW the projects: fetch next open in-radius bid docs -> read RFP/finishes on Claude -> real scope+value into dossier + deep_knowledge.json (1/run, worth-first)

tasks.name: verified_intelligence
tasks.description: Live-fetch missing docs + verify-read real scope + re-rank all open projects. HOURLY (6/29) so the verified truth stays close to the live scrape cache; Telegram answers read this store.

tasks.name: build_report_snapshots
tasks.description: Render read-only reports to data/memory/report_cache/*.txt so Telegram-Carol can READ them (OpenClaw allowlist blocks the .cmd exec). Read-only; cannot send.

tasks.name: learn_from_interactions
tasks.description: Daily 23:30: mine the day's CLI + Telegram transcripts for Nursultan's corrections/teachings/praise -> distill durable lessons (claude-code) -> dedup -> append new ones to AGENTS_LESSONS.md + ledger + digest. Carol's automatic learning loop.

tasks.name: claude_sub_shim
tasks.description: Keepalive: ensure the Claude Max-subscription shim (127.0.0.1:8199) is up so Telegram-Carol runs on Opus 4.8 via the subscription (free); relaunch detached if down, else she falls back to Gemini.
